Directorate of Health, Culture, and Sports Services

The Directorate of Health, Culture, and Sports Services

plans and carries out activities related to culture, arts, sports, career development, psychological counseling, student club activities, and similar areas beyond students’ academic life, together with students. It aims to make students’ academic lives valuable, enjoyable, and productive, and to add colorful and lasting touches to their life mosaics.

The most important mission of the Health, Culture, and Sports Services Directorate is to equip our students, from their first day at university, not only with academic skills but also with personal, social, cultural, artistic, and physical development, and to create an environment where they can acquire the skills to become successful and effective individuals in both their professional and social lives through activities in these areas.
